description: Stand up a weekly PIE (Problems, Incidents, Escalations) bridge between engineering and support leadership: shared hour, live scenarios, prioritization, relationship repair, and detection of escalation abuse from sales or other groups.

examples.context: New smaller server/storage org. Support hammered. Eng lazy on basics. Sales escalated constantly. Mutual hate.
examples.resolution: Weekly PIE eng director + support. Relationship solid in weeks. Work prioritized in the open.

examples.context: Escalation audit showed a few sales/SE paths and their leadership using escalate to hide their own issues.
examples.resolution: Definitions locked. Abuse path called out with data. Escalation volume became meaningful.

examples.context: Engineers exhausted by the same basic questions.
examples.resolution: KB and training owned by support. Eng time freed for real problems.
